examples: This is the sort of drivel you get from a bunch of feral leftie hippies with no idea of the real world.
Many of the world's leaders and stars are left-handed, with some known for being hot-tempered. One famously grumpy leftie is tennis legend John McEnroe.
Yes, there was the danger that she could be quickly pigeonholed by voters and her opponents as the leftie Valleys republican firebrand.
Clement Attlee, the prime minister, was a reformist but no leftie.
Health was given to Frank Dobson, an old leftie.
